name: meituan-paotui
description: An Agent Store adapter for the official Meituan Paotui Skill source.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare Meituan runner-service requests with explicit user confirmation.
interface.longDescription: Meituan Paotui is a store adapter that points agent users to the official Meituan Paotui Skill source and enforces safe usage notes. It does not redistribute the upstream Meituan code unless the upstream license or authorization permits it.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use meituan-paotui to prepare a safe Meituan runner-service request.
